demographics.audit_notes: Data aligns with 1990 Decennial Census for Tract 19.04. The provided tract ID '419.0' does not match official numbering; using Tract 19.04 which covers Windsor Hills. Some new fields (e.g., rent burden, foreign born) are not available at the tract level for 1990.
